playbook.intent: v1 with flat retention and stalled growth → executed pivot (segment / feature / model / sunset) with brand intact.
playbook.scope: v1 is not working: retention flat, growth stalled, founder energy bleeding. Solo founder decides and executes a structured pivot (segment / feature / model / sunset) without burning the brand or customer trust. Exit artifact is a v2 brief or a sunset comms plan.

success-criteria.criterion: Pivot dimension chosen (segment / feature / model / sunset)
v2 brief OR sunset comms plan written
Existing customer cohort migrated or honestly off-boarded
Founder energy plan: defined commitment runway for v2

stage.name: Diagnose
stage.intent: Cold-eyed look at why v1 stalled.

tasks.task: Pull market data: competitors, segment shift

stage.decision-gate: Advance when pivot dimension is chosen. Refuse to skip diagnosis — drift back to v1 patterns otherwise.

stage.name: Choose
stage.intent: Pick the pivot or pick sunset. No 'partial' pivots.
stage.decision-gate: Required output: signed decision doc with runway. No 'see how it goes'.

stage.name: Communicate
stage.intent: Tell existing customers what's changing — honest, early, specific.

tasks.task: Draft customer comms (3 versions: migrate / sunset / continue)

stage.decision-gate: Advance when ≥80% of paying customers acknowledge comms. Stay if silence.

stage.name: Execute
stage.intent: Build v2 OR off-board v1 cleanly.

tasks.task: Off-board v1 users with refund policy

outputs.output: v2 shipped on staging OR v1 sunset complete

stage.decision-gate: Advance once v2 lives on staging OR v1 is fully off-boarded with refunds processed.

stage.name: Reflect
stage.intent: Lessons learned. Update memory. Don't repeat this.
stage.decision-gate: Required output: written retro. Without it, the same mistake recurs.

extra.value: [Marketing campaigns for v2 — covered in launch playbook, Co-founder recruitment — solo operator throughout]
[v1 live for ≥6 months with revenue data, 'Honest founder audit: retention < target AND growth flat for 3+ months']
[Building v2 before deciding to pivot — accidental scope drift, Silent sunset — ghosting customers destroys future trust]
['Did I write down WHY v1 failed in specific terms, or stay vague?', 'Did existing customers hear from me personally before reading a public post?']
{human: faion get-content pivot-v1-to-v2 --format md, agent: faion get-content pivot-v1-to-v2 --format context, json: faion get-content pivot-v1-to-v2 --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P1 solo SaaS builder persona}]
